description: v2 Deepen iter7: per-property-type sub-model architecture on lane A. Train top-3 type sub-RFs (n_est=100, same recipe) on type subsets of train; blend 0.3*sub + 0.7*global for predictions of that type. xgboost_v4 saw -215 cumulative from this exact architecture. Top types: UNE MAISON (10085), UN APPARTEMENT (6443), TERRAIN DE TYPE TERRE ET PRE (2020).
